news.headline: Florida Lung Health Coalition, DELFI Diagnostics, RadNet, Inc., and American Lung Association partner for lung cancer screening program in 2024.
news.summary: In an unprecedented partnership revealed today in Palo Alto, California on October 22, 2024, the Florida Lung Health Coalition and DELFI Diagnostics, along with backing from RadNet and the American Lung Association, have joined forces to introduce an innovative program aimed at revolutionizing the fight against lung cancer.

news.headline: Investors in Kaspi.kz (NASDAQ: KSPI) with losses urged to contact RLF for ongoing investigation. - Rosen Law Firm
news.summary: A securities law firm, Rosen Law Firm in New York, has disclosed on Oct. 22, 2024, that they are conducting an investigation into the Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz (NASDAQ: KSPI) regarding possible breaches of federal securities laws. Investors who have invested in KSPI are advised to seek further information to understand the situation better.

news.headline: BerryDunn opens 9th office in Kapolei, Hawaii, showing commitment to clients in the Pacific; strengthens understanding of the region's diversity.
news.summary: A new office has been launched by BerryDunn in Kapolei, Hawai‘i, marking their ninth location. Dedicated to providing assurance, tax, and consulting services, the firm aims to cater to Hawai‘i-based employees and representatives. This move underscores their dedication to clients in Hawai‘i, serving as a strong foothold in the vast Pacific region. Shea Berry-Brennan, Principal in the Medicaid Practice, highlights the significance of gaining insights into the cultural and environmental nuances of the area.

news.headline: Elizabeth Margles named CEO of Ortal North America on July 8, 2024, leading luxury fireplace company in North America.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Columbus, Ohio, the renowned luxury fireplace company Ortal appointed Elizabeth Margles as the new Chief Executive Officer of Ortal North America. This announcement was made effective starting July 8th, 2024. Margles will now be responsible for overseeing the company's operations in North America.

news.headline: Philip Morris Q3 revenue reaches $9.91B, up 8.4%, beats consensus. Organic net revenue up by 11.6%. FY 2024 EPS outlook raised to $6.45-$6.51.
news.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) announced a third-quarter revenue of $9.91 billion, showing an increase of 8.4% compared to the previous year and surpassing the expected $9.69 billion. Their net revenues saw an 11.6% organic growth, driven by favorable pricing due to higher tobacco prices and increased volume in smoke-free products. The company adjusted its fiscal year 2024 EPS outlook to $6.45-$6.51, up from the previous $6.33-$6.45, above the expected $6.41. Analysts at Goldman Sachs view the new guidance as achievable, highlighting the strong performance of iQOS and improvements in ZYN. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tesla, led by Elon Musk, transferred $776M in Bitcoin recently; Arkham says the company still owns the wallets.
news.summary: Last week, Tesla, the electric car manufacturer, transferred its Bitcoin holdings. However, data analytics firm Arkham suggests that despite the transfer, Elon Musk's company still retains ownership of the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Oncology market in India to grow by USD 1.49 billion (17.43% CAGR) from 2024-2028 due to rising cancer prevalence and AI evolution.
news.summary: In New York on October 22, 2024, a report highlighted the impact of AI on market dynamics. Specifically, the Oncology Market in India is projected to increase by USD 1.49 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a forecasted Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 17.43%. This data was released by Technavio, indicating significant growth and transformation within the industry due to artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Pesticide market in India to increase by $529M from 2024-2028 due to rising herbicide usage, driven by AI impact - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on the market landscape, specifically focusing on India's Pesticide Market. It is projected to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 529 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to register a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.82% during this forecast period, signaling significant development and opportunities within the industry.

news.headline: Handshake Speakeasy in Mexico City named world's best bar in The World's 50 Best Bars 2024, sponsored by Perrier. Mexico's first top spot.
news.summary: Mexico City's Handshake Speakeasy has achieved the prestigious title of No.1 in The World's 50 Best Bars 2024, marking the first time a Mexican bar has claimed the top position. The 2024 list includes bars from 28 different cities, with 16 new additions from locations such as Bangkok, Bogotá, Guadalajara, Hong Kong, Lima, Melbourne, Milan, and New.

news.headline: Encompass Health to redeem $100 million of 5.75% Senior Notes due 2025, with a redemption date of November 21, 2024.
news.summary: Encompass Health Corporation (NYSE: EHC) from Birmingham, Alabama, announced on October 22, 2024, its intention to redeem $100 million of the outstanding principal balance of its 5.75% senior notes due 2025 (the "2025 Notes"). The redemption date for this redemption is set for November 21, 2024.

news.headline: Traffic safety expert Amy Witherite criticizes NTSB probe into Tesla's FSD tech as potentially too late due to millions on road.
news.summary: In Dallas, Attorney Amy Witherite, a traffic safety specialist, warns about the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) probe into Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) technology, suggesting it may be too delayed as millions of FSD-equipped vehicles are already in use. A Tesla accident being examined involves a failure of the FSD mode to decelerate, highlighting the urgency for action regarding this matter.

news.headline: 2024 SuperMotocross season saw a 26% increase in viewership, averaging 502,000 viewers, with the Washougal Pro Motocross Race peaking at 1 million viewers. Over 1.9 billion total streaming minutes noted.
news.summary: In the 2024 season, the average viewership reached 502,000 across NBC, USA Network, and streaming services such as Peacock and NBC Sports Digital. This marked a 26% increase compared to the 2023 season. The Washougal Pro Motocross Race on July 20 stood out by attracting over 1 million viewers, making it the most-watched race since 2021. Throughout the season, more than 1.9 billion total minutes were streamed across various platforms.

news.headline: 3,000 Teamsters across 20 local unions approve Western Regional Agreement with Hertz, securing wage hikes.
news.summary: In a recent development, 3,000 members of the Teamsters union across nine states have successfully negotiated and ratified the Western Regional Master Agreement with Hertz through 20 local unions. The agreement, spanning a duration of three years, not only secures stronger union protections but also entails noteworthy wage hikes for the workforce. This positive outcome signifies a step forward in enhancing the working conditions and economic well-being of the employees involved.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift acquires 3.68 acres near Phoenix for retail center development. Leading real estate developer expands operations.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona on October 22, 2024, Thompson Thrift, a prominent real estate company and top commercial developer, revealed the acquisition of around 3.68 acres of land for a new project in the South region.

news.headline: Global Athletic Footwear Market expected to reach USD 75.5 Billion by 2033, growing at 4.9% CAGR. Key players mentioned.
news.summary: The global athletic footwear market is experiencing significant growth, with revenue expected to rise from USD 46.6 billion in 2023 to USD 48.8 billion in 2024. The market is projected to reach approximately USD 75.5 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.9% between 2024 and 2033. Key market players include Nike Inc., Adidas AG, and VF Corporation, among others. The report by Custom Market Insights provides detailed analyses of sales, revenues, and strategies of these prominent companies and others in the athletic footwear market.

news.headline: VCI Global (NASDAQ: VCIG) plans to reorganize AI business, raise capital, and start share repurchase.
news.summary: On September 10, 2024, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, VCI Global Limited (NASDAQ: VCIG) (Frankfurt: H0T) disclosed plans for restructuring its AI business, fundraising efforts, and an upcoming share buyback initiative.

news.headline: Seamless Advanced Solutions rebrands as Optimus TechServices, joining Optimus Tech Group, providing world-class solutions with six core business units.
news.summary: On September 10, 2024, in Austin, Texas, Seamless Advanced Solutions has rebranded as Optimus TechServices and joined the Optimus Technology Group. This move integrates them into a conglomerate offering top-notch solutions through six key business divisions: Optimus TechServices, Optimus Communications, Optimus Data Centers, Optimus Security, Optimus Power, and Optimus Artificial Intelligence. The formation of the Optimus Technology Group enables swift provision of consistent services to clients. Drawing from over 80 years of collective expertise, the company's foundation lies in ensuring exceptional client satisfaction, a vision initiated in 2017.

news.headline: NowVertical Group restructures LATAM ops, completes A10 obligations. TSX-V: NOW, OTCQB: NOWVF involved.
news.summary: In Toronto on September 12, 2024, NowVertical Group Inc. (TSX-V: NOW) (OTCQB: NOWVF), a prominent data analytics and AI solutions firm, disclosed the finalization of its restructuring of debts related to Group Analytics 10 and Inteligencia de Negocios along with associated entities (collectively known as "A10") in a bid to restructure its operations in Latin America.

news.headline: Green Thumb Industries initiates a $50M share repurchase program, aiming to buy 10,573,860 Subordinate Voting Shares.
news.summary: Green Thumb Industries Inc., a prominent national cannabis consumer packaged goods company and owner of RISE Dispensaries, disclosed on September 16, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved a $50 million share repurchase initiative. This program, conducted under a normal course issuer bid, allows for the repurchase of up to 10,573,860 of its Subordinate Voting Shares over the following 12 months. In the preceding repurchase program, which concluded on September 10, 2024, Green Thumb acquired 6.5 million shares at a cost of $73.3 million.

news.headline: Refresco acquired Frías, a top Spanish plant-based drink producer. Acquisition expands beverage portfolio.
news.summary: Beverage company Refresco recently announced the acquisition of Frías, a prominent Spanish manufacturer specializing in plant-based drinks. This strategic move aims to expand Refresco's product offerings and bolster its presence in the plant-based beverage market. The acquisition of Frías positions Refresco to capitalize on the growing demand for plant-based drinks, leveraging Frías's expertise and established reputation in the industry. The deal underscores Refresco's commitment to driving growth and innovation within the beverage sector. The acquisition of Frías represents a significant investment for Refresco, signaling its dedication to strengthening its market position and meeting the evolving needs of consumers.

news.headline: LLYC announced a new U.S. leadership structure to consolidate operations, increase efficiency, and explore opportunities in the market.
news.summary: On September 23, 2024, LLYC (BME:LLYC), an international Corporate Affairs and Marketing consultancy, revealed a revised corporate arrangement for the United States. This restructuring aims to enhance resource utilization, expand service offerings, and optimize the firm's positioning for growth within the U.S. market. The adjustments seek to streamline operations while capitalizing on emerging opportunities, reflecting LLYC's strategic approach to bolster its presence and capabilities in the region.

news.headline: Court approves Complete Solar purchase of SunPower assets including Blue Raven, New Homes, Dealer business for $45 million.
news.summary: The Bankruptcy Court has given the green light for the sale of SunPower's Blue Raven, New Homes, and Dealer business to Complete Solar for a total of $45 million.

news.headline: Nashville Entrepreneur Center offers new support programs to speed up startups, providing flexible resources.
news.summary: Updated programs have been introduced to accelerate entrepreneurs in bringing their products to market. These revamped initiatives provide founders with flexible and on-demand resources to support their journey. This move aims to enhance the efficiency of launching new ventures and reduce the time to market for startups. The programs offer a range of services tailored to meet the specific needs of each founder, helping them navigate challenges and seize opportunities in today's competitive landscape. This is part of a strategic effort to streamline the process and improve success rates for startups.

news.headline: Summary: Insider buying seen in 3 mid-cap stocks under $20, indicating undervaluation; Transocean stock trades at $4.26.
news.summary: The financial news often mentions heavy insider selling in stocks, assuming insiders believe the stock is overpriced. However, most sales are part of pre-disclosed plans. Insider buying suggests undervaluation. Three undervalued stocks priced under $20, providing growth potential and mitigating risk from unprofitable small-caps. Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG), a mid-cap stock leasing rigs and drilling equipment, is positioned well for a potential oil upturn. RIG stock trades at $4.26 as of October 11, 2024, with analysts giving it a consensus Hold rating.

news.headline: Water Ways undergoes restructuring, citing a loss of $2 million in Q3 and plans to lay off 15% of staff.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.7%, with a total of 1.5 million new jobs being added in the past month. Additionally, the GDP has seen a significant increase of 6.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The stock market has also experienced a surge, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200 points. These positive economic indicators have led to increased consumer confidence and optimism for the future.

news.headline: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. is offering €75 million 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029, raising debt capital.
news.summary: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. is looking to raise debt capital through a private offering of €75 million aggregate principal amount of additional 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kronos International, Inc. The Notes are being issued as an addition to the existing €276,174,000 aggregate principal amount of 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 that KII issued on February 12, 2024. The Notes will have the same terms as the Existing Notes and will be maintained under the same ISIN and Common Code numbers as the Existing Notes. The Notes issued under Regulation S will initially trade separately with different ISIN and Common Code numbers but will eventually merge with the Existing Notes after 40 days from the issue date.

news.headline: RLI Corp. (NYSE: RLI) may surprise with earnings due to favorable estimate activities. Analysts indicate positive indicators.
news.summary: Investors are on the lookout for stocks with potential for positive performance during earnings season, and RLI Corp. (NYSE: RLI) is a promising option. The company is set to report its earnings soon, and there are positive indicators leading up to this event. Recent activities show a favorable trend in earnings estimate revisions for RLI, hinting at a possible earnings beat. Analysts have been updating their estimates with the most current information available, often a reliable signal for potential success. This development bodes well for RLI as they approach their upcoming earnings report.

news.headline: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. sells additional €75M of 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029, maintaining terms of Existing Notes.
news.summary: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. subsidiary, Kronos International, Inc., is selling €75 million aggregate principal amount of additional 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 through a private placement. This is in addition to the existing €276,174,000 Senior Secured Notes issued earlier in 2024. The new Notes will have the same terms as the existing Notes, except for the date of issuance and issue price. The Notes will be maintained under the same ISIN and Common Code numbers as the existing ones, except for the ones issued under Regulation S, which will trade separately initially but then merge with the existing Notes post 40 days from their issuance.

news.headline: Primeline Energy Holdings Inc. has been placed in Official Liquidation in Cayman Islands on Oct. 3, 2024. TSXV symbol "PEH.H".
news.summary: In Grand Cayman on October 3, 2024, Primeline Energy Holdings Inc. (In Official Liquidation) has officially entered liquidation in the Cayman Islands. The company, trading under the symbol “PEH.H” on the NEX Board of the TSX Venture Exchange, has taken this step.

news.headline: Refresco completes EUR 400M Term Loan B to repay existing debts, raise cash. Increased Revolving Credit Facility to EUR 625M. CFO pleased with market demand.
news.summary: Refresco, a global independent beverage solutions provider, completed a EUR 400 million Term Loan B transaction with an interest rate of EURIBOR plus 3.50%. The proceeds will be used to repay borrowings, including EUR 100 million of an existing loan, and increase cash reserves. The CFO mentioned the market demand for the loan and its benefits for the company's strategy. The maturity date of the loan remains July 2029. Additionally, the company increased its Revolving Credit Facility by EUR 125 million to EUR 625 million. Refresco operates in Europe, North America, and Australia, producing a variety of beverages in different packaging formats. With over 14,500 employees, the company emphasizes improving product quality, packaging, and meeting environmental responsibilities and market demands. For media inquiries, contact Hendrik de Wit at +31 6 1586 1311 or hendrik.dewit@refresco.com.

news.headline: Motorsport Games seeks strategic alternatives to enhance shareholder value, explore sale/merger, and secure funding for Le Mans Ultimate console release.
news.summary: In Miami on October 4, 2024, Motorsport Games Inc. (NASDAQ: MSGM) revealed plans to explore strategic options to enhance shareholder value, such as a potential sale or merger. The Board of Directors has given the green light for management to pursue these alternatives. Additionally, the company is in search of funding to capitalize on promising prospects, one being the introduction of Le Mans Ultimate to Sony PlayStation and Microsoft Xbox gaming consoles. Le Mans Ultimate, the official game of the FIA World Endurance Championship and the 24 Hours of Le Mans, was initially launched on PC platforms in early access mode in February 2024.

news.headline: Medical services sector is evolving with digital applications, telemedicine, and AI-powered technology. Healthcare analytics market to hit $130 billion by 2029. Shortage of 100,000 healthcare workers in the US by 2028, particularly nursing assistants. Top stocks: ELV, DOCS, HQY. Digital revolution shaping the future.
news.summary: The Medical Services sector is evolving rapidly due to digital innovation, with a surge in demand for remote treatment leading to the growth of digital healthcare options. The global healthcare analytics market is projected to exceed $130 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 22.9% from 2024 to 2029. Primary stakeholders like payers, healthcare professionals, and patients stand to benefit from new insights and services. Companies like Elevance Health, Inc. (NYSE: ELV), Doximity (NYSE: DOCS), and HealthEquity (NASDAQ: HQY) are expected to capitalize on this transformation.However, post-pandemic healthcare faces a shortage of manual workforce globally, particularly in the United States. By 2028, a deficit of over 100,000 healthcare workers is predicted, with nursing assistants expected to have the largest shortage, estimated at over 73,000. This shortage is causing increased labor costs and healthcare expenses.The Zacks Medical Services industry includes service providers like pharmacy benefit managers and healthcare workforce solution providers. It has shifted towards value-based care, requiring specialized external service providers. Three key trends shaping the industry's future are the digital revolution, advancements in medical devices such as robotic surgeries and remote monitoring, and the growing importance of effective healthcare management in the modern healthcare system.

news.headline: OMERS earns $5.6 billion in first half of 2024; 10-year average annualized net investment return at 7.1% with $133.6 billion in assets.
news.summary: In Toronto, as of August 15, 2024, OMERS reported a net investment return of 4.4%, equivalent to a $5.6 billion profit for the January 1 to June 30, 2024, period. As of June 30, 2024, the Plan achieved a 10-year average annualized net investment return of 7.1%, resulting in a $67.5 billion gain. The total net assets amounted to $133.6 billion.

news.headline: Black Diamond Therapeutics to focus on BDTX-1535, extending cash runway with restructuring plan.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 6.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. This growth exceeded expectations by analysts, who had predicted a 5.7% increase. Additionally, the unemployment rate fell to 4.9%, the lowest it has been in over a year. The strong economic performance was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 8.2%, reflecting increased confidence in the market. Despite concerns about inflation, which reached 2.5%, the overall outlook for the economy looks positive. Government officials are optimistic about continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Top Wealth Group Holding Limited prices $10.8 million public offering of 27 million ordinary shares at $0.40 each on NASDAQ.
news.summary: Top Wealth Group Holding Limited, a Hong Kong-based luxury caviar supplier, has announced the pricing of its public offering of 27,000,000 ordinary shares at $0.4 per share. The gross proceeds from the offering are expected to be around $10.8 million. The offering is set to close on October 14, 2024. AC Sunshine Securities LLC is acting as the sole placement agent for this offering. The securities are being offered under a registration statement on Form F-1 and a preliminary prospectus has been filed with the SEC. Interested parties can obtain copies of the final prospectus from AC Sunshine Securities LLC.

news.headline: Dow Jones down as Goldman beats earnings; UnitedHealth plunges on Q3 results. Market Today update.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a drop as the Dow Jones index declined. The decline was attributed to the mixed earnings reports from major companies. Goldman Sachs exceeded expectations, leading to a slight increase in their stock value. However, UnitedHealth recorded a significant decrease in their Q3 earnings, causing their stock to plunge. This news caused the Dow Jones index to go down during the day. The specifics on the percentage of the decline in the Dow Jones and the extent of the plunge in UnitedHealth stocks were not provided in the information.

news.headline: PIMCO Canada launches ETF series of Canadian Core Bond Fund, expected to trade under ticker symbol CORE on TSX.
news.summary: On August 19, 2024, PIMCO Canada Corp. unveiled its ETF series units for the PIMCO Canadian Core Bond Fund, aiming for total return while prioritizing capital preservation through investments in a diversified portfolio of Canadian dollar fixed income with different maturities. The ETF Series Units, trading under the ticker symbol CORE on the Toronto Stock Exchange, were set to begin trading that morning.

news.headline: SMGZY vs. CLMB: Identifying better value tech stock. Zacks Rank: SMGZY #1, CLMB TBD. Further analysis needed.
news.summary: Those interested in Technology Services stocks may be familiar with Smiths Group PLC (OTC: SMGZY) and Climb Global Solutions (NASDAQ: CLMB). Determining which stock offers better value for investors is crucial. Incorporating a strong Zacks Rank with an impressive Value rating from the Style Scores system has been shown to yield optimal returns. Smiths Group PLC holds a Zacks Rank of #1 (Strong Buy). This strategic approach focuses on identifying companies with positive earnings estimate revisions and evaluating companies based on specific traits. For more detailed information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fulcrum Therapeutics grants stock options to 2 new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) for its 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on October 11, 2024, Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that they had provided non-statutory stock options to two fresh employees. The company, listed on Nasdaq as FULC, focuses on developing small molecules to benefit patients with rare genetic diseases at the clinical stage. These stock options were granted under the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan, serving as an inducement for the new employees joining Fulcrum. This move aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Dow drops 325 points, Nasdaq hit hardest, energy stocks crumble, Trump Stock halted; live coverage details.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the main stock market indicators experienced declines, with the Nasdaq composite suffering the most compared to others. The energy sector saw a notable pullback, causing the Dow Jones index to drop by 325 points. Additionally, the performance of Trump Stock came to a standstill. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily in their live coverage.

news.headline: Comparison between CAE (NYSE: CAE) and Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) as value stocks, both with Zacks Rank #2.
news.summary: Those interested in Aerospace - Defense Equipment stocks may be familiar with CAE (NYSE: CAE) and Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY). The question arises: which of these stocks is more appealing to value investors? To determine this, it is crucial to delve deeper. Each individual has their own approach to identifying value opportunities, but our strategy combines a strong score in the Value category of our Style Scores system with a robust Zacks Rank. The trusted Zacks Rank prioritizes earnings estimates and revisions, while our Style Scores pinpoint stocks with specific attributes. Currently, both CAE and Teledyne Technologies hold a Zacks Rank of #2. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico issued 56,481,343 long-term bond certificates in Mexico valued at Ps. 5,648.1 million with a 5-year maturity, oversubscribed by 1.2x.
news.summary: Today, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V., completed the issuance of 56,481,343 long-term bond certificates in Mexico valued at Ps. 5,648,134,300. Each bond had a nominal value of Ps. 100 and a maturity period of five years. The order book exceeded the original issuance amount by 1.2 times.

news.headline: Wilson Electronics rebrands to Wilson Connectivity, introduces private 5G solution with unique integration of Hybrid and Active DAS.
news.summary: Wilson Connectivity has introduced a groundbreaking integration of Hybrid and Active Distributed Antenna Systems (DAS) that is reshaping the capabilities of private 5G networks. This innovative solution is boosting the performance and reach of private 5G networks significantly. Through the combined use of Hybrid and Active DAS, Wilson Connectivity is achieving unparalleled levels of connectivity, with data speeds reaching up to 10 Gigabits per second (Gbps) and coverage extending across areas up to 100,000 square feet. This convergence of technologies is setting a new standard for private 5G deployment, unlocking a host of opportunities for improved communication and connectivity in various settings.

news.headline: Markets drop as ASML plummets; Dow Jones futures go up, Nvidia boosts tech. ASML sank before the open, but Nvidia and AI chip leaders rise.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the stock market experienced a decline in major indexes due to a significant drop in ASML, leading to a negative impact on chip stocks. ASML continued to decrease before the market opened, however, Nvidia and other prominent AI chip companies saw a slight increase after hovering around buy points. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures exhibited a rise amidst the market turmoil, with Nvidia playing a key role in boosting the technology sector while ASML continued its sell-off.

news.headline: BiomX (PHGE) announces mandatory unit separation (PHGE.U) consisting of one stock share and one warrant at $115 each.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Md., on Oct. 15, 2024, BiomX Inc. (NYSE American: PHGE) revealed plans for a mandatory separation of its units trading under "PHGE.U". Each unit comprises one share of Common Stock and one warrant allowing the purchase of half a share at $115 per share. BiomX, focused on phage therapies targeting specific pathogenic bacteria, aims to streamline its offerings through this initiative.

news.headline: Biodexa's appeal against Nasdaq delisting is a success, avoiding removal of its shares.
SEC chair Gary Gensler marks Bitcoin white paper 16th anniversary, supports current regulation strategy on crypto per Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent interview with Bloomberg, Gary Gensler indicated that he does not intend to change the SEC's current strategy of regulating cryptocurrency through enforcement actions.

news.headline: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. has priced an additional $150 million of 9.500% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2029.
news.summary: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. disclosed today the pricing of its offering of an extra $150 million aggregate principal amount of its previously released 9.500% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2029 (the “Notes”). The private placement was made to qualified institutional buyers in the United States under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, as amended, to non-U.S. individuals outside the United States under Regulation S of the Securities Act, and under certain prospectus exemptions in Canada. The company trades under the tickers GTE on NYSE American, TSX, and LSE.

news.headline: SANUWAVE Health implements a reverse stock split at a ratio of 1-for-375.

Manhattan Associates to report Q3 earnings on Oct. 22. Estimating $1.06 EPS and $261-$265 million revenue. 0.95% EPS growth, 10.45% revenue increase from last year. Earnings beat with 26.61% surprise average.
news.summary: Manhattan Associates (NASDAQ: MANH) will release its Q3 2024 results on Oct. 22. They anticipate earnings of $1.06 per share and revenues ranging from $261 million to $265 million. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings has remained stable at $1.06 per share over the past month, showing a 0.95% increase from the previous year's quarter. The Consensus Estimate for revenues is at $263.36 million, reflecting a 10.45% rise from the same quarter last year. Manhattan Associates has consistently surpassed earnings estimates in the last four quarters, averaging a 26.61% surprise. The upcoming quarter is predicted to benefit from strong demand for its mission-critical solutions.
